description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish handbag from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsSuede finish brown bag with one main compartmentFlap with buckles and magnetic button closure over patch pocketInner separator and synthetic lining with zippered pocketsOne zippered pocket at backTwo short handles and long adjustable shoulder strap for carrying easeMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 20 cmWidth: 26 cmDepth: 11 cm
